questionHtml:
Which processes occur in an ecosystem?

I. Biomass increases in each successive trophic level.

II. Inorganic nutrients are recycled.

III. Chemical energy is stored in carbon compounds.

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III
